name: Buckwheat Applesauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order listed and place into the bread pan.
2. Select white bread setting.
3. Press Start.
Note: This hearty bread features a coarse crumb and slightly sweet flavor, perfect for toasting as a satisfying breakfast or served with fruit and cheese for a light lunch. It makes 1 loaf, yielding 8 slices. Each slice contains 125 calories, less than 1 gram of dietary fiber, less than 1 gram of soluble fiber, 23 grams of carbohydrates, 3 grams of protein, 2 grams of fat (14% from fat), 0 milligrams of cholesterol, 245 milligrams of sodium, 56 milligrams of potassium, and 5 milligrams of calcium.
